The '''Sabaoth Defender''' was a heavy assault [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] used by the [[Sabaoth Squadron/Legends|Sabaoth Squadron]], a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Navy/Legends|navy]]/[[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] under the command of Captain [[Cavik Toth]]. The Defender was a heavy version of the [[Sabaoth starfighter]].

Roughly fifteen meters in length, the Sabaoth defender was an armored attack starfighter with twin prongs jutting from either side of the cockpit, and was armed with powerful [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launchers. These fighters also carried onboard [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]], and were carried into battle by immense [[Sabaoth destroyer]]s. They were often deployed with an escort of two Sabaoth starfighters.

Captain Toth's forces deployed squadrons of Sabaoth defenders against a [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Jedi starfighter]] squadron high above [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] at the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|start]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Protecting their carrier vessels and [[Hex Deployer]] transports, the defenders entered into single combat with [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] and her [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] pilots. However, they were no match for the vaunted Jedis' skills.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' {{1st}}
